name: blockchain-pii-protection
description: Secure PII Guard - Full Stack Application

scripts.install:backend: backend\venv\Scripts\pip.exe install -r requirements.txt && backend\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m spacy download en_core_web_sm
scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.dev: npx concurrently --kill-others "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
